title: Outdoor Air
full_text:
8.4.4.15 Outdoor Air
Outdoor Air
1) The peak outdoor air ventilation rates for the reference building shall be identical
to those determined for the proposed building in Sentence 8.4.3.6.(1).
2) Where demand control ventilation strategies required by Article 5.2.3.4. are
implemented in the proposed building, the reference building shall be modeled with
those same strategies.

sentences.text: The peak outdoor air ventilation rates for the reference building shall be identical to those determined for the proposed building in Sentence 8.4.3.6.(1).
Where demand control ventilation strategies required by Article 5.2.3.4. are implemented in the proposed building, the reference building shall be modeled with those same strategies.
